caption: In an indoor venue with recessed ceiling lighting and beige walls, several individuals perform choreographed martial arts movements. A man in a yellow traditional tunic and trousers dominates the center of the scene, wielding a long, flexible staff or pole. He begins by holding the staff horizontally in front of him, then swings it behind his back and eventually rotates it in wide arcs. Behind him, another person in a blue outfit mirrors some of the movements, while a third person in a blue set of clothing performs separate motions to the side. A crowd of spectators is seated in the background, watching the performance. As the sequence progresses, the man in yellow shifts his stance and rotates the staff with fluid motions, moving from a frontal position to a side-facing posture as the other performers continue their coordinated routine.
